extraction.one_line_summary: ASGREEN Casper won from a 185km breakaway that never exceeded 90 seconds, misjudged by sprint teams who caught them on the line but 10 meters too late.
tactical_patterns: Sprint teams catastrophically misjudged catching a breakaway at only 90 seconds maximum gap over 185km, losing by meters.
Soudal squad committed three riders to ultra-long marginal breakaway, revealing desperation for stage results mid-Tour.
CAMPENAERTS Victor sacrificed own sprint to lead out ASGREEN in final meters, former hour record holder used tactically.

rider_signals.ASGREEN Casper: positive: first Tour stage win in fifth attempt shows Soudal finally prioritizing him over team duties
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: negative: third-place finish despite perfect team leadout reveals inability to close minimal gaps at maximum speed
rider_signals.GESCHKE Simon: negative: finished dead last on Stage 17 inside time limit, suffering badly on consecutive mountain stages
